message:
fix: compile error + clippy warnings in frankenterm-core, add 18 PolicySurface proptest properties

- connector_data_classification.rs: fix E0382 use-of-moved-value by cloning
  `decision` before consuming in struct initializer
- runtime_telemetry.rs: add `Eq` derive to `UnifiedTelemetryRecord` (clippy
  derive_partial_eq_without_eq), inline `connector_failure_class()` at sole
  call site (clippy single_option_map)
- proptest_policy.rs: add `arb_policy_surface()` strategy and 18 new property
  tests (Properties 73-90) covering PolicySurface serde roundtrip, as_str
  stability, default_for_actor, surface-filtered rules, case-insensitive
  matching, specificity scoring, multi-surface OR semantics, and evidence trails

All 95 proptest_policy tests pass. Clean clippy on frankenterm-core lib.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
